description_long: This is a muscular adult woman with a punk-inspired appearance, featuring a partially shaved head and a mohawk hairstyle. She wears a cropped top and asymmetrical pants, with one leg covered by armored padding and the other exposed, suggesting a rugged, combat-ready style. Her arms are adorned with fingerless gloves and bracers, and she has a utility belt with pouches and metallic accessories around her waist. The character's body is decorated with visible tattoos and scars, enhancing her tough, streetwise persona. She also sports heavy boots with reinforced shin guards and spikes, adding to her intimidating look. The overall design suggests a character suited for urban or dystopian environments, possibly as a street fighter or survivor.
description: A muscular, punk-styled adult woman with a mohawk, armored clothing, and combat accessories, exuding a tough, streetwise presence.
description_view_0: Back view showing the mohawk, armored shoulder pads, utility belt, and reinforced boots with spikes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the asymmetrical pants, arm bracers, and profile of the mohawk.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cropped top, muscular build, tattoos, and facial features with a confident stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exposed leg, utility belt details, and arm accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: punk-inspired cropped top, asymmetrical armored pants, fingerless gloves, utility belt, and bracers
